hard_stops.logic: exchange information is required before 1031 exchange analysis can proceed
45-day identification deadline has passed — exchange fails unless already identified
180-day closing deadline has passed — exchange cannot be completed
exchanger has received or had access to exchange proceeds — constructive receipt disqualifies exchange

soft_flags.logic: fewer than 10 days remain to identify replacement properties — act immediately
fewer than 30 days remain to close on replacement property
estimated taxable boot exists — exchanger will owe taxes on the difference
transaction involves a related party — two-year holding requirement and additional IRS scrutiny apply
